# Hermes A2A Plugin

## Description
A Hermes Agent plugin that adds A2A (Agent2Agent) protocol support. Enables any A2A-compatible agent (OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex) to discover and delegate tasks to Hermes.

## Key Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/maisonnat/hermes-a2a-plugin
- Docs: https://maisonnat.github.io/hermes-a2a-plugin/
- Hermes Agent: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com
- A2A Protocol: https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A
- Hermes Plugins Docs: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/user-guide/features/plugins/

## Project Structure

```
hermes_a2a_plugin/       # Plugin source code
├── __init__.py          # Plugin entry point — register() with hooks + tools
├── plugin.yaml          # Hermes plugin manifest
├── schemas.py           # LLM tool schemas (what the model sees)
├── server.py            # A2A HTTP server — Agent Card + tasks/send
├── bridge.py            # Bridge — A2A tasks → Hermes AIAgent
├── bridge_mcp.py        # MCP server — OpenCode discovers Hermes as tools
docs/                    # MkDocs documentation
tests/                   # Test suite
mkdocs.yml               # Documentation config
```

## Key Concepts

### Plugin System
- `register(ctx)` is called by Hermes PluginManager on session start
- Available hooks: `session_start`, `session_end`, `pre_tool`, `post_tool`
- Available registrations: tools, hooks, commands, skills, CLI subcommands

### A2A Protocol (distinct from ACP)
- Agent2Agent: Google → Linux Foundation, universal agent communication
- NOT the same as ACP (Agent Client Protocol by Zed/JetBrains for IDE integration)
- Uses JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP/SSE
- Agent Card at `/.well-known/agent-card.json` for discovery
- Task lifecycle: `submitted → working → completed | failed | canceled`

### A2A Server
- Python built-in `http.server` (zero external deps for MVP)
- Can swap to Starlette + Uvicorn for production
- Endpoints: `GET /health`, `GET /.well-known/agent-card.json`, `POST /tasks/send`

### Python SDK Note
The real A2A Python SDK lives in the `a2a-samples` repo (NOT the `a2a` PyPI package, which is a web scraper). Install from: https://github.com/a2aproject/a2a-samples

## Quick Start
```bash
# Enable in Hermes
hermes plugins enable hermes-a2a
# Start server
hermes a2a serve --port 4097
# Test
curl http://localhost:4097/.well-known/agent-card.json
```

## API Reference

### POST /tasks/send
JSON-RPC 2.0 task delegation:
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "params": {
    "id": "task-id",
    "message": {
      "role": "user",
      "parts": [{"text": "Do something"}]
    }
  }
}
```

### GET /.well-known/agent-card.json
Returns Agent Card with capabilities, skills, auth requirements.

### GET /health
Returns `{"status": "ok", "agent": "hermes-a2a-plugin"}`
